feed.title: ranbits — 6G standardization tracker
feed.subtitle: Source-tracked changes to 3GPP 6G / ITU-R IMT-2030 status.

entry.title: TR 38.914 (6G scenarios & requirements) recorded at ~60% complete (March 2026), approval targeted ~June 2026.
entry.content: TR 38.914 (6G scenarios & requirements) recorded at ~60% complete (March 2026), approval targeted ~June 2026. (items: TR 38.914) [source 2026-03-01]

entry.title: TR 22.870 (Stage-1 6G use cases) recorded as approved at TSG SA#111 (Fukuoka, March 2026).
entry.content: TR 22.870 (Stage-1 6G use cases) recorded as approved at TSG SA#111 (Fukuoka, March 2026). (items: TR 22.870) [source 2026-03-13]

entry.title: Initial 6G tracker baseline established from verified primary (3GPP, ITU-R) and labelled secondary sources.
entry.content: Initial 6G tracker baseline established from verified primary (3GPP, ITU-R) and labelled secondary sources. (items: TR 22.870, TR 38.914, ITU-R M.2160, IMT-2030 TPR, 6GR, 6G-waveform, 6G-spectrum-fr3, 6G-spectrum-wrc27, 6G-subthz, 6G-ai-air, 6G-isac, 6G-ris, TR 23.801, 6G-ntn, 6G-security) [source 2026-06-15]
